name: Stax
description: Stax — US subscription-based payment processor with flat-rate pricing, interchange-plus, and integrated POS for SMB merchants.

when_to_use: Flat-rate subscription payment processing for US SMB merchants
Interchange-plus pricing for US retail and restaurant POS
Integrated POS and online checkout for US small businesses

pros: Flat subscription pricing scales for volume
cons: Legacy tech feel vs modern API-first peers
review.verdict: Math works for mid-volume US SMBs — below $10k/month, flat-rate processors beat the subscription.
review.best_for: US SMBs processing $15k+/month wanting predictable interchange-plus pricing
review.not_for: Low-volume merchants or anyone needing modern developer APIs
